channel.title: love2d-community/awesome-love2d Weekly Updates RSS Feed
channel.description: Track daily updates of more than 500 awesome projects, including selfhosted, rust, javascript, swift, python, react, vue, free for dev, flutter, go etc.

item.title: love2d-community/awesome-love2d Jul 25th - Jul 31st, 2022
item.description:
AI

  • pathfunstars5 - Pure Lua library for 2D pathfinding using the funnel algorithm.

    • UI

  • cimgui-lovestars38 - LÖVE module for Dear ImGui obtained by wrapping cimgui (programmatically generated C-api) using LuaJIT FFI, easy to update to the latest Dear Imgui version.

item.title: love2d-community/awesome-love2d Jun 13th - Jun 19th, 2022
item.description:
Camera

  • cam11 - Camera library that leverages the Transform object introduced in love2d 11.0+.

item.title: love2d-community/awesome-love2d May 30th - Jun 5th, 2022
item.description:
UI

  • Slicystars5 - A newer 9patch/9slice library fixing some issues with Patchy.

item.title: love2d-community/awesome-love2d May 16th - May 22nd, 2022
item.description:
Utilities

  • nativefsstars16 - Read and write files outside of LÖVE's allowed paths.

item.title: love2d-community/awesome-love2d Apr 25th - May 1st, 2022
item.description:
Distribution

  • love-fuserstars10 - Packages LÖVE Games using GitHub Actions. Supports Windows, Linux, and Android.

item.title: love2d-community/awesome-love2d Mar 21st - Mar 27th, 2022
item.description:
Performance

  • AppleCakestars11 - Profiling library for LÖVE, with detailed profiling and thread support.

    • Drawing

  • grove.draworder - Similar to deep, but you can set a custom sorting method and create multiple, nestable instances.

    • Helpers

  • grove.color - Blend, convert and interpolate colors using 'color objects'.

item.title: love2d-community/awesome-love2d Feb 28th - Mar 6th, 2022
item.description:
Distribution

  • love-packagerstars6 - Simple CLI to package your LÖVE Game in seconds.

    • Animation

  • Aseprite loaderstars12 - Complete ase/aseprite file loader (no json).

item.title: love2d-community/awesome-love2d Feb 7th - Feb 13th, 2022
item.description:
Input

  • Swipestars1 - A simple radial keyboard library.

    • UI

  • Heliumstars77 - A modern, customizable, high performance retained UI framework.
  • ListBoxstars14 - A dynamic ListBox for LÖVE that supports touch, mouse, and keyboard inputs.
  • Lynx - Very-lightweight list-based UI library.
  • Planstars13 - A super simple Rule-based layout library.

item.title: love2d-community/awesome-love2d Jan 17th - Jan 23rd, 2022
item.description:
Tutorials

  • CS50 Introduction to Game Development - Harvard Colleges CS50 OpenCourseWare.
  • learn2love - Book for learning programming with Lua and LÖVE (Version 11.0+).
  • Using Tiled Maps in LÖVE - An article about using maps created with Tiled in your LÖVE game.
  • Tutorial on making an Arkanoid-type game - A complete tutorial on how to make a breakout clone by nooowaay.
  • Simple Game Tutorials - Tutorials for making simple games with LÖVE (Snake, Sokoban, Tetris, etc.).
  • How to LÖVE - A book by Sheepolution teaching LÖVE from the ground up.
  • Building love2d games for the web with love.js and Docker - A tutorial on packaging LÖVE games for the web.

    • IDEs

  • Atom - A hackable text editor for the 21st Century (obsolete).
    • Love-Atom - Smart autocompletion for the LÖVE framework in Atom.
    • Autocomplete GLSL - Adds GLSL autocompletion in Atom.
    • language-glsl - OpenGL Shading Language support in Atom.
    • language-lua - Lua language support in Atom.
    • linter-luacheckstars12 - Lint Lua on the fly, using luacheck.
    • Löve Launcher - Launch LÖVE for the current project without having to leave Atom.
    • Löve IDE - This package auto-installs several utilities for writing Love2D games in Atom.
      • Autocomplete Löve - Auto-complete and snippets for LÖVE.
      • Hyperclick Löve - A Hyperclick provider for LÖVE which shows the wiki.
      • linter-luaparse - Lua syntax error checking in Atom.
  • Brackets - A modern, open source text editor by Adobe (obsolete).
    • Lua Syntax Highlighterstars3 - Add Lua syntax highlighting in Brackets.
    • LÖVE Hints for Brackets.io - Provides LÖVE code hints.
    • Run LÖVEstars4 - Run LÖVE projects with a hotkey.
  • ZeroBrane Studio - ZeroBrane Studio is a lightweight Lua IDE with code completion, syntax highlighting, live coding, code analyzer, and debugging support.
    • API Syntax Hightlightstars9 - Script to add LOVE API syntax highlighting to ZBS.
  • IntelliJ IDEA - Capable and Ergonomic Java IDE.
    • EmmyLuastars520 - Lua IDE/Debugger Plugin for VSCode.
    • LÖVE IDEAstars58 - Snippets and code completion for IntelliJ-IDEA.
  • Vim - Vim is a highly configurable text editor built to make creating and changing any kind of text very efficient.
    • Vim LOVE Docsstars48 - Syntax highlighting for Vim.
  • Notepad++ - Notepad++ is a free source code editor and Notepad replacement that supports several languages.
    • LÖVE API for Notepad++stars10 - Code completion and documentation for Notepad++.
  • Visual Studio Code - VS Code is a new type of tool that combines the simplicity of a code editor with what developers need for their core edit-build-debug cycle.
    • Visual Studio Code LÖVE Launcher - A Löve Launcher Extension for Visual Studio Code.
    • Lua for Visual Studio Code - Provides Intellisense and Linting for Lua in VSCode.
    • Local Lua Debugger - Simple Lua debugger with no dependencies. Löve specific launch.json example provided.

    • 3D

  • love-gltf - Gltf asset loader and test renderer; Supports skeletal animations and morph targets.
  • model_rendererstars15 - A simple 3d model renderer for love2d.
  • anim9stars28 - 3D skeletal animation library (design to be used with IQM and IQE).
  • Brinevector3Dstars10 - FFI-enabled vector library for 3D (x,y,z).
  • IQEstars8 - Inter-Quake Export loader (text).
  • IQMstars35 - Inter-Quake Model loader (binary).
  • Lovoxstars45 - Pseudo-3D library for working with voxels.

    • Animation

  • androssstars30 - A Lua library for 2D skeletal/bone animations with a Löve backend.
  • anim8stars555 - Animation library.
  • animxstars18 - A featureful Animation library for loading animations from XML files!.
  • chirostars25 - Convenience wrapper around Spine.
  • Peachystars88 - A parser/renderer for Aseprite animations in LÖVE.
  • skeletorstars25 - 2D skeletal animation system.
  • Waltstars54 - Animation library.
  • Lumpstars19 - Adobe Flash animation runtime.
  • lovanimstars23 - A minimal stateful animation library.
  • SYSL-Textstars47 - Text animation and automatic wrapping library based on tags.

    • Drawing

  • renderplanetstars19 - Realistic orthographic planet rendering.
  • Sölarstars5 - A fairly simple solar system simulator.
  • Artalstars41 - A .PSD parsing library for LÖVE.
  • Autobatchstars98 - Small LÖVE module to automate the use of SpriteBatches.
  • centerstars8 - A simple module to dynamically align and fit content to screens of any size.
  • deepstars40 - Adds Z axis; allows you to queue actions and draw calls.
  • draftstars43 - A module for drawing complex shapes.
  • HSLUVstars41 - Lua implementation of HSLuv (a human-friendly alternative to HSL).
  • Maid64stars43 - Low resolution scaler for LÖVE.
  • Pushstars384 - A simple resolution-handling library for LÖVE.
  • svgloverstars43 - Library to import and display simple SVGs in LÖVE.
  • SYSL-Pixelstars24 - Pixel art focused scaler for graphics, position, screen-captures and shaders.
  • Tove2dstars146 - Animated vector graphics for LÖVE.
  • turtle.luastars74 - Turtle graphics library for LÖVE.
  • Runtime-TextureAtlasstars11 - Texture atlas packer and renderer at runtime; no external tools.
  • Export-TextureAtlasstars3 - Extends Runtime-TextureAtlas as a commandline tool to export an atlas.

    • Helpers

  • batteriesstars188 - Fills out lua's sparse standard library and provides implementations of common algorithms and data structures useful for games.
  • luestars40 - Lue is a LÖVE library that allows you to display hue color effects in your game.
  • roomystars33 - Screen management library for LÖVE.
  • shackstars50 - Shack is a LÖVE library that lets you easily add screen effects such as shake and rotation.
  • astraystars123 - Astray is a lua based maze, room and dungeon generation library for dungeon crawlers and roguelike video games.
  • clovestars22 - A helper library which allows you to quickly loads huge amount of assets.
  • iffystars17 - A SpriteSheet and Tileset helper library for LÖVE.
  • knifestars349 - Collection of useful micro-modules for Lua (Class, State Machines, Bind, Chain, Coroutines, Event, Memoize, Entity, Tests, Timer).
  • shardstars13 - Collection of useful mini modules.
  • love-state-switcherstars8 - State switcher class for Lua LÖVE Engine.
  • lumestars760 - Collection of functions for Lua, geared towards game development.
  • narratorstars68 - An Ink narrative scripting language parser and runtime implementation.
  • reflowprintstars40 - A library designed for alignment of text that is shown one character at a time.
  • rotLovestars224 - Roguelike Toolkit in LÖVE. A LÖVE/lua port of rot.js.
  • ScreenManagerstars29 - Screen/State Management for the LÖVE framework.
  • Simple Tiled Implementationstars685 - Tiled map loader and renderer.
  • Vividstars51 - Color math, manipulation and conversion library.
  • Yonderstars10 - A ridiculously easy to use game state management library for LOVE2D.

    • Math

  • nvec - Hump.vector-compatible LuaJIT FFI-accelerated 2D vector library.
  • vector.luastars30 - A simple vector library based on the PVector class from processing.
  • Bresenhamstars13 - Bresenham's line algorithm written in Lua.
  • brinevectorstars38 - Standalone lightweight luajit ffi-accelerated 2D vector library for great performance.
  • Cirno's Perfect Math Librarystars263 - Math/intersection library designed for games.
  • delaunaystars96 - Delaunay triangulation for convex polygons.
  • hump.vector - Powerful 2D vector class.
  • MLibstars71 - Math and shape-intersection detection library written in Lua. It's aim is to be robust and easy to use.
  • shashstars49 - A simple, lightweight spatial hash for Lua.

    • Physics

  • breezefieldstars33 - A lightweight and easy love.physics wrapper (windfield alternative).
  • Bumpstars768 - Collision detection library for Lua.
  • HC - Collision detection with arbitrary polygons; allows rotation of objects.
  • Strikestars12 - 2D collision detection library. Extendable, based on Separating-Axis-Theorem.

    • Serialization

  • arsonstars6 - Companion library for registering custom data types that can be encoded and decoded by json.lua.
  • binserstars168 - Customizable Lua Serializer.
  • bitserstars139 - Serializes and deserializes Lua values with LuaJIT.
  • cdatastars30 - Serialize between Lua data and C data using LuaJIT's FFI.
  • knife.serialize - Serialize data as a Lua script.
  • Ladystars34 - Saving and loading savegames; based on Ser.
  • moonblobstars19 - Binary serialization and data parsing library.
  • Serstars72 - Fast, robust, richly-featured table serialization library for Lua.
  • Smallfolkstars16 - A fast, robust, secure, richly-featured table serialization library for Lua.
  • tricklestars29 - A bitstream library focused on high compression for use in networking.

    • UI

  • Love Imguistars282 - Imgui module for the LÖVE game engine.
  • SUITstars417 - Small immediate mode GUI library.
  • CatUIstars84 - A very light-weight GUI library for LÖVE.
  • GOOistars189 - Android-oriented GUI library.
  • Gspöt - A stateful GUI lib for LÖVE.
  • Hanker - Maximalist immediate mode-ish UI elements; gamepad-friendly.
  • LoveFrames Forkstars93 - 11.2 Fork of a GUI library.
  • Löve-Nuklearstars298 - Lightweight immediate mode GUI for LÖVE games.
  • Patchystars33 - 9patch library.
  • SafeWordstars3 - An overscan detection library for LÖVE.

    • Utilities

  • ShakeDetectorLuastars4 - Uses accelerometer data for shake device detection written in Lua.
  • ArrayRotation - Rotation of two dimensional arrays (square and non-square).
  • cargostars137 - Asset manager.
  • chance.lua - Library for generating random data.
  • colorchangerstars1 - Change the colors in your LÖVE game.
  • Flirtstars12 - LÖVE version manager; allows to switch between multiple versions of engine on same machine.
  • GifCatstars38 - A simple module for saving gifs from LÖVE.
  • hex2colorstars5 - A single function to use HEX color values.
  • i18nstars20 - Internationalization library designed to help localize your game.
  • Ini Parserstars11 - General purpose ini configuration parser.
  • log.luastars247 - Library for configurable log output.
  • love-loaderstars113 - Threaded resource loading.
  • love2d-assets-loaderstars33 - Assets Loader.
  • love-pestars13 - A tool made in LÖVE for changing LÖVE icon itself.
  • lovely-enginestars8 - A tool that makes setting up and using LÖVE easier and with Moonscript support.
  • Lilystars87 - Async Asset Loader.
  • luasteamstars74 - Lua bindings for the Steamworks API.
  • Luventstars66 - Simple event-driven programming.
  • nativefiledialog - Open a file picker on Windows/Mac/Linux.
  • Optikon - WYSIWYG visual level designer.
  • ParticleEditorstars1 - An editor of particle for LÖVE.
  • particle-system-playgroundstars11 - A basic LÖVE particle system editor.
  • require.luastars4 - Require all files in a folder.
  • splashystars32 - Splash Screen Library.
  • tickstars61 - Useful timing tweaks for LÖVE's run loop.

    • AI

  • Jumperstars574 - Grid-based pathfinding library.
  • Lua-starstars40 - Easy and pure Lua A* path finding.

    • Camera

  • Bradystars52 - Camera library with parallax scrolling.
  • Editgridstars40 - Gamera and HUMP compatible scaling grid.
  • gamerastars202 - Camera system.
  • hump.camera - Camera library with window locking and smooth camera movement interpolation.

    • Development

  • FPSGraphstars14 - Small FPS graphing utility.
  • debugGraphstars29 - Small OO FPS graphing utillity based on FPSGraph.
  • Lovebirdstars257 - Browser-based debug console.
  • LoveDebugstars90 - Inline console-like debugger utility.
  • lurkerstars240 - Auto-swaps changed Lua files in a running game.
  • LÖVE APIstars253 - The complete API documentation of LÖVE in a Lua table.
  • LÖVE Buildstars43 - GitHub Action for automated cross-platform builds.
  • LÖVE TypeScript Definitionsstars87 - Write LÖVE games with TypeScript.
  • lovelierstars12 - A LÖVE live reloader with Moonscript support.

    • Entity

  • adorbsstars28 - Minimal, Functional Entity Component System.
  • Concordstars154 - A feature-complete ECS library.
  • knife.system - Minimalist functional ECS.
  • natastars35 - Hybrid OOP/ECS entity management.
  • tiny-ecsstars513 - Entity Component System for Lua that's simple, flexible, and useful.

    • Input

  • batonstars166 - Input library for LÖVE that bridges the gap between keyboard and gamepad controls.
  • love-microphonestars55 - Simple microphone support for LÖVE.
  • LoveKeysstars5 - A simple input handeling library that keeps track of things for you.
  • tactilestars49 - A straightforward and flexible input library.

    • Lighting

  • lighterstars19 - A performant dynamic light implementation with a simple API.
  • Shädowsstars153 - A Shadows & Lights engine for LÖVE.
  • Light Worldstars207 - A lighting model.
  • Simple Love Lightsstars21 - A very simple raycasting light implementation.
  • Lightstars7 - A simple dynamic light implementation.

    • Music

  • denverstars73 - A Löve custom waveform generation library.
  • lovebpmstars64 - A LÖVE library for syncing events to the BPM of an audio track.
  • ripplestars27 - An audio manager with tagging support.
  • wavestars79 - A sound manager with audio parsing and rhythm functionalities.

    • Networking

  • Grease - Networking library intended to make networking easy for lovers (TCP, UDP, Enet). (IPv6)
  • LoverNetstars53 - A networking library that leverages bitser and enet. (IPv4)
  • NoobHubstars271 - OpenSource multiplayer and network messaging. (IPv6)
  • Sock.luastars148 - A Lua networking library for LÖVE games. (IPv4)
  • löve-wsstars20 - A websocket client and server library.
  • love2d-lua-websocketstars21 - A simple event-driven websocket client library. (IPv4)

    • OO

  • 30logstars380 - Minified framework for object-orientation in Lua. It features named (and unnamed) classes, single inheritance and a basic support for mixins.
  • classicstars650 - Tiny class module for Lua. Attempts to stay simple and provide decent performance by avoiding unnecessary over-abstraction.
  • hump.class - Small, fast class/prototype implementation with multiple inheritance (class-commons).
  • middleclassstars1.5k - Simple OOP library for Lua; has inheritance, metamethods (operators), class variables and weak mixin support (class-commons).
  • muunstars6 - Moonscript compatible class implementation.
  • selenestars12 - Project template for writing games in Moonscript instead of Lua without precompiling.

    • Performance

  • jprofstars73 - Profiling library/tool for LÖVE.
  • Piefillerstars20 - Graphical profiler for LÖVE.
  • ProFi - A simple lua profiler that works with LuaJIT and prints a pretty report file in columns.

    • Platforms

  • LoveDosstars612 - A Lua framework for 2D DOS games, implementing a subset of the LÖVE API.
  • LoveFTW - Work-in-progress port to Windows phone 8.1.
  • LovePotionstars395 - Unofficial work-in-progress implementation of the LÖVE API for Nintendo 3DS and Nintendo Switch Homebrew.
  • LOVE-WrapLuastars29 - A small and simple wrapper for OneLua, lpp-vita, and Lua Player PS3.
  • Love.jsstars387 - LÖVE ported to the web using Emscripten.
  • LÖVRstars1.4k - LÖVE for virtual reality devices.

    • Publishing

  • Love-Snap-Templatestars22 - A template for packaging LÖVE games for distribution in the Snappy Store.
  • AppImageKitstars7.5k - Using AppImageKit you can package LÖVE games as AppImages that run on common Linux-based operating systems, such as RHEL, CentOS, Ubuntu, Fedora, debian and derivatives; one game = one file.

    • Shaders

  • LoveShaderConverterstars60 - Convert Shadertoy Shader files to LÖVE GLSL Files with handy utilities for infinite purposes.
  • Shadertoy viewer - Run code copied from shadertoy directly or output the converted code to a LÖVE shader.

    • Testing

  • bustedstars1.1k - Simple unit-testing framework with customizable assertions.
  • knife.test - Fixture-free test framework.
  • Luassertstars137 - Extends assert() with additional, customizable tests.
  • Lunateststars76 - xUnit-style randomized unit testing framework.
  • luststars78 - Minimal test framework.
  • Specl - Behavior Driven Development (BDD) tool.
  • Telescope - Highly-customizable BDD-style testing library.

    • Tweening

  • Fluxstars301 - A fast, lightweight tweening library for Lua.
  • hump.timer - Timer and tweening library with flexible tweening methods.
  • tickstars91 - Lua module for delaying function calls.
  • tween.luastars485 - Tweening/Easing/Interpolating functions for Lua inspired on jQuery's animate method.

    • Distribution

  • love-exportstars46 - Fast and simple command-line tool that builds binaries for you. Supports Windows, macOS, and Linux.
  • love-deploystars5 - Build and deploy games on itch.io (supports windows and web exports).

    • Related

  • awesome-luastars3.2k - A list like this one, but more general and encompassing all of Lua's uses.
  • awesome-love-shadersstars63 - A collection of shaders designed to work in LÖVE.
  • awesome-pico8stars2.2k - A curated list of PICO-8 resources, tutorials, tools and more.

item.title: love2d-community/awesome-love2d Jan 3rd - Jan 9th, 2022
item.description:
Helpers

  • humpstars49 - Collection of tools for developing games with LÖVE (Gamestates, Timers/Tweens, Vectors, Classes, Signals, Cameras).

item.title: love2d-community/awesome-love2d Aug 16th - Aug 22nd, 2021
item.description:
UI

  • Slabstars209 - Slab is an immediate mode GUI toolkit for the LÖVE framework.

item.title: love2d-community/awesome-love2d Jul 26th - Aug 1st, 2021
item.description:
Shaders

  • ngrading - Simple color grading library.

    • UI

  • NLaystars19 - Flexible layouting library.

item.title: love2d-community/awesome-love2d Feb 22nd - Feb 28th, 2021
item.description:
Distribution

  • boonstars109 - Multi-platform, easy to use tool supporting Windows, macOS, Linux.
  • love-releasestars436 - A Lua script that automates game distribution. Supports Windows, macOS, Debian, Linux.
  • makelovestars71 - Advanced multi-platform tool to fuse your game written in Python 3. Supports Windows and Linux with AppImage.

item.title: love2d-community/awesome-love2d Feb 1st - Feb 7th, 2021
item.description:
Input

  • inputstars2 - Simple and powerful input library. support check operation time, sequence.

    • 3D

  • g3dstars348 - Simple and easy 3D engine for LÖVE.

item.title: love2d-community/awesome-love2d Oct 5th - Oct 11th, 2020
item.description:
UI

  • YALGstars10 - A very simple, cross-platform, reactive UI for last minute UIs.

item.title: love2d-community/awesome-love2d Mar 23rd - Mar 29th, 2020
item.description:
AI

  • astarstars8 - An other A* library. Any map(gird, point, mesh or infinite map) and support path cost.

item.title: love2d-community/awesome-love2d Dec 23rd - Dec 29th, 2019
item.description:
3D

  • 3DreamEnginestars231 - An awesome 3D engine for LÖVE.

item.title: love2d-community/awesome-love2d Oct 1st - Oct 7th, 2018
item.description:
3D

  • bump-3dpdstars61 - A 3D collision detection library for Lua.

    • Helpers

  • cartographerstars58 - Small Tiled map loader and drawer.
  • lovely-windowsstars14 - A Window/Screen Manager Module for virtual windows.

    • OO

  • knife.base - Extremely minimal base class providing single inheritance and constructors.

    • Physics

  • loveblobsstars59 - A softbody library with support for both dynamic and static arbitrary softbodies.

    • Shaders

  • Moonshinestars445 - Repository of common post-processing effects like blur, vignette, color-grading, etc.

    • Tweening

  • knife.timer - Create timers and tweens with ease.

    • UI

  • Polywell - A highly-configurable text editor / coding tool written in Lua that runs on the LÖVE game engine.

    • IDEs

  • Sublime Text - Sublime Text is a sophisticated text editor for code, markup and prose. You'll love the slick user interface, extraordinary features and amazing performance.
    • Package Manager - The Sublime Text package manager that makes it exceedingly simple to find, install and keep packages up-to-date.
    • SublimeLove - Supports syntax highlighting, auto-completion, and build system.
    • SublimeLinter-luacheck - Provides linting and static analysis of your Lua code.
